title: BLOCK 5 FINAL: Sustained speed
description: Block 5 final — 75 WPM on a long real-world paragraph
text: Three-quarters of the way through, you have built something rare: the ability to type at the speed of thought. Most people peak at 40 WPM and stay there for life. You are past 75. The remaining blocks will take you over 90 — well into the top 5% of typists in the world.

tips.text: Seventy-five words a minute is faster than most people will ever manage. Three-quarters of the road is behind you.
Hold this pace and you are in rare company. Not because of the figure, but because of the steadiness that earned it.

tips.target: Three-quarters of the way through, you have built something rare: the ability to type at the speed of thought. Most people peak at 40 WPM and

tips.text: What comes next is real-world copy, then polish. You are earning both the honest way - one clean line at a time.

tips.target: stay there for life. You are past 75. The remaining blocks will take you over 90 — well into the top 5% of typists in the world.

character_tips.anna: Block five, finished clean. Seventy-five sustained is a genuine skill - the kind a newsroom would hire on the spot. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: Seventy-five words a minute, held steady, is a working skill for life. Use it on words worth typing. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Don't crow about the figure. Notice your hands stayed calm the whole way - that is the real win. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: Lovely, even work to the last line. The lessons left are polish, not struggle. Keep the rhythm and enjoy them. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
